description: Style Note This wallet from hidekraft is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet. Product Details Three-fold black walletHas two main compartments, six card slots, two insert pockets and an id card holder Branding embossed on the front Material and Care Genuine leather Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 11 cm x 8 cm
